chunks.title: Woe to the Rebellious Children
chunks.reason: A prophetic declaration of judgment against those who seek alliance with Egypt instead of trusting Yahweh.

chunks.title: The Oracle of the Beasts and the Rejection of God's Word
chunks.reason: A continuous prophetic speech detailing the futility of Egypt's help, the people's stubbornness, and the coming judgment.

chunks.title: Promise of Restoration and Healing
chunks.reason: A section shifting from judgment to hope, describing God's patience, the Teacher's presence, and future agricultural abundance.

chunks.title: The Coming Judgment on Assyria
chunks.reason: A vivid vision of Yahweh's arrival to judge the nations and destroy the enemy in Topheth.
